title: Add todo filter tabs
summary: Added active/completed filter tabs on branch todo/session-filter-tabs, later integrated into todo/review-toolbar where the header toolbar overlaps with bulk actions and the final conflict branch.
goal: Make the todo list easier to scan by adding filter tabs at the top of the list.
changesMade: Added a filter state for all, active, and completed
Changed the list rendering to show only the selected subset
Added filter buttons above the todo list

features.name: todo filter tabs
features.why: Reviewers often want to isolate active work items or completed items without scanning the whole list.

decisions.decision: Use tab-like buttons in the main header area
decisions.why: Filtering should be immediately visible near the task count, even in a simple demo app.

blockers: Merging with bulk triage work changes the same header toolbar and visibleTodos flow in App.jsx.
openQuestions: Should the selected filter persist in local storage?
Should the filter state survive when merged with search and bulk triage controls?
resumePrompt: Continue the todo filter work. Preserve the all/active/completed filter UX and keep the controls near the task count when resolving conflicts on todo/review-toolbar or todo/conflict-resolution.
